remaining_tasks.name: PARITY-03: /joint_states publishes 6 joints not 7 (gripper/left_finger_joint missing); URDF order not alphabetical; frame_id empty (Gazebo expects base_link)

PARITY-04: /tf publishes nothing observable (only static World->aic_unified_robot edge from /tf_static); Plan 06 OmniGraph wiring needs nvidia-suite-docs consult on ROS2PublishTransformTree parentPrim/targetPrims/articulation traversal

TEX-01/02/03: 921 sweep hits — mostly cosmetic ISO_4762/V1015120 screw sub-references (43 unresolved) + 8 camera-prim-path bugs in setup_wrist_cameras (pre-Plan-09) + ~13 actual MDL/texture/fallback. Sweep doc populated; needs categorized fix log.

Plan 09 mount-rail USDs (LC/SFP/SC Mount + vendored NIC Card Mount/nic_card_mount_visual.usd) all mPU=0.01 + Y-up — would spawn 100x smaller + rotated when SCENE-01 trial runs explicitly call them with present=True. Latent for Phase 1 default; required for SCENE-01 trial-spawn correctness.
Visual regression diagnosis (Gap E) — superseded by inline empirical work (commit 121244a). Plan file present but not executed via GSD.

TF tree completion (Gap B) — not executed; needs revisit after empirical TF investigation.

Texture sweep + verify_phase_1.sh hot-fixes (Gap C) — not executed; verify_phase_1.sh Step 8 path-with-spaces bug confirmed; sweep findings categorized but not fixed.

blockers.description: Phase 1 closure depends on resolving Gap A (JointState gripper joint + ordering + frame_id) and Gap B (TF dynamic publisher empty)
blockers.workaround: Visual regression already fixed inline (commit 121244a). Phase 1 PARITY-01/02/05/12 + TEX-01/02 (vendoring side) + DX-01/02 are done. Only PARITY-03/04 + TEX-03 final + SCENE-01 trial-correctness remain.

blockers.description: Plan 06 OmniGraph node configuration for ROS2PublishTransformTree and ROS2PublishJointState is not actually publishing the joint chain — needs nvidia-suite-docs sub-skill consult to find correct parentPrim/targetPrims input wiring for Isaac Sim 5.0
blockers.workaround: Empirical investigation showed dynamic /tf has no joint frames; /joint_states only sees UR5e arm articulation (not Hand-E). Wiring needs revision.

blockers.description: User has paused inline diagnosis after Gap E visual fix landed; awaiting direction on continuing TF/JointState OmniGraph fixes vs. accepting partial Phase 1 vs. separate session

human_actions_pending.action: Visually confirm in the running Isaac Sim viewport that objects are at correct real-world scales after the AIC_OBJECTS path revert (commit 121244a)
human_actions_pending.context: User reported 'major mismatch in object size' before the fix. Empirical bbox readings now match real AIC components (task_board ~34cm, SC ports ~3-4cm, NIC card ~16x8x18cm, UR5e ~1m). Visual confirmation closes Gap E definitively.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide direction for Gap A (JointState gripper joint missing) and Gap B (TF dynamic publisher empty): continue inline with nvidia-suite-docs, or pause Phase 1 here and resume in a fresh session.
human_actions_pending.context: These are real Isaac Sim API configuration gaps surfaced by empirical investigation after the polluting ROS launch was killed. They need OmniGraph node wiring corrections, not just code edits.

decisions.decision: Pull SCENE-01, SCENE-04, PARITY-05, PARITY-12, DX-02 forward into Phase 1 (was Phase 2/3)
decisions.rationale: Surface-adjacency rule added to CLAUDE.md: same edit surface (extension.py + AIC_OBJECTS + asset tree), cheaper to combine than re-enter later

decisions.decision: AIC_OBJECTS USD paths reverted to m+Z-up originals (task_board_rigid.usd, sc_port.usd, nic_card.usd) — Plan 04 had silently swapped to *_visual.usd cm+Y-up variants
decisions.rationale: USD property-level pxr inspection: *_visual.usd are mPU=0.01+Y-up, originals are mPU=1.0+Z-up; parent stage is m+Z-up; Isaac Sim doesn't auto-rescale on AddReference, so visuals imported 100x smaller and rotated 90deg

decisions.decision: Visual regression diagnosis done inline (commit 121244a) instead of via GSD gap-closure plans 01-G01/02
decisions.rationale: User explicitly directed inline approach: 'no need to go through the gsd phase for this this has to be done inline'

decisions.decision: Killed leftover ROS2 launch from ros-mcp-server/compliant_insertion_studio that was publishing competing /joint_states (6 joints, ros2_control), /tf (rg2_state_publisher), /tf_static (tool0_to_rg2_base_link) — DDS aggregation was masking Isaac Sim's actual publishers during verification
decisions.rationale: verify_phase_1.sh Step 6 reported missing TF frames that actually existed in the OTHER process's publish; once isolated, Isaac Sim's own publishers showed different (worse) gaps

decisions.decision: Mount-rail USDs (LC/SFP/SC Mount + NIC Card Mount/nic_card_mount_visual.usd) at mPU=0.01+Y-up — fix deferred to follow-up, latent because spawn_*_mount_rail atoms default to present=False
decisions.rationale: Default add_objects clubbing path doesn't call them; user-visible scene is correct without them. Required for SCENE-01 trial-spawn correctness when sample_config.yaml specifies present=True for any mount.

uncommitted_files: CLAUDE.md (working-tree dirty pre-Plan-03 — preserved across all plan executions per stash/restore precedent; contains Phase scope rule + canonical refs additions)
.planning/ROADMAP.md (modified by gap-closure planner — added G01-G05 plan list entries)
.planning/phases/01-foundation-parity/01-G01-PLAN.md through 01-G05-PLAN.md (created by /gsd-plan-phase 1 --gaps; not executed via GSD per user direction)
next_action: User decides whether to continue inline TF/JointState OmniGraph fix work (consult nvidia-suite-docs for ROS2PublishTransformTree proper parentPrim/targetPrims wiring + ROS2PublishJointState configuration to capture both UR5e arm + Hand-E gripper articulations), or accept Phase 1 partial state and tackle in a fresh session.
context_notes: Phase 1 expanded from 8 to 9 plans with SCENE-01/04 + PARITY-05/12 + DX-02 pulled forward. All 9 plans landed code-complete. Verifier reported gaps_found 5/9. User reported additional visual regression (Gap E). Inline diagnosis found TWO regressions: (1) Plan 04 silently swapped AIC_OBJECTS to *_visual.usd variants (cm+Y-up vs parent m+Z-up) — fixed inline (commit 121244a) by reverting paths to m+Z-up originals (now byte-identical to pre-Plan-02 originals because Plan 02's vendoring just moved files into capitalized folders). (2) Plan 09 mount-rail USDs are also cm+Y-up but only fire on explicit present=True. After fixing AIC_OBJECTS, empirical Isaac Sim probe (with polluting ROS launch killed) showed real Phase 1 gaps: /joint_states has 6 joints not 7 (gripper missing from articulation that targetPrim sees), /tf publishes nothing observable beyond /tf_static's World->aic_unified_robot edge. These need OmniGraph wiring corrections, not just code edits. Critical insight: original verifier ran with polluting ROS launch active, saw aggregated topics, mis-attributed gaps to Isaac Sim — ground truth was different. Visual fix is committed. Isaac Sim still running on port 8768 with corrected scene. Ready for resumption with empirical data in hand.
